headline: Billionaire Investor Bill Ackman’s Top 5 Bets: Buy, Hold, or Steer Clear?
summary: Pershing Square's five-stock book is quietly beating the market while four of those names bleed red year to date, and one just dropped a $14.8 billion takeover bid this week. Here is whether Ackman's conviction holds up or leaves you holding the bag.

headline: Joby, Archer, and EHang Are Down 40% to 60% in 2026. Are Air Taxi Stocks Damaged Beyond Repair?
summary: Air taxi stocks have shed nearly half their value in 2026, and the losses keep accelerating. Before writing them off or doubling down, investors need to understand what separates a beaten-down opportunity from a broken story.

headline: Fintech Disruptor StockFan Wins Bronze Globee® Award After Exploding Into 62 Countries in Year One
summary: StockFan, Inc., the hyper-growth Silicon Valley fintech platform revolutionizing how investors worldwide interact with public markets, has been named a Bronze Winner in the prestigious Annual Globee® Awards. This major accolade celebrates StockFan's product excellence and breakout growth velocity, having scaled its global footprint to 62 countries in its very first year of operation.

headline: Lucid Rallies 10% for a Third Straight Up Day, Leaving Tesla, Rivian Behind

headline: Uber to Acquire Germany-Based Delivery Hero in $14.8 Billion Deal
summary: Uber is making its biggest move yet in global food delivery. The company announced Thursday that it has agreed to acquire Germany-based Delivery Hero in a transaction valued at approximately $14.8 billion, a deal that would significantly expand Uber Eats’ international reach and create a combined mobility and delivery platform operating across 99 countries. headline: GameStop (GME) Joins Uber Eats For On Demand Delivery Nationwide
summary: GameStop (NYSE:GME) has entered a partnership with Uber Eats to offer delivery of its products through the Uber Eats platform. The arrangement covers video games, consoles, and accessories, with on demand delivery available to customers across the United States. GameStop operates as a specialty retailer focused on video games, consoles, and related accessories, an area that continues to evolve as more spending shifts online. Partnerships with large delivery platforms are one way retailers...
